name: ESX-8CV Combiner
description: This algorithm allows you to drive the outputs of an ESX-8CV module attached to an ES-5 expander which is in turn attached to the disting NT.

parameters.name: Expander
parameters.description: Chooses the expansion header on the ES-5 to which the ESX-8CV is connected.

parameters.name: Adaptive
parameters.description: Controls whether the algorithm will update all eight of the hardware outputs continuously (non-adaptive mode), or only those outputs that are changing (adaptive mode).

parameters.name: Output 1 Bus
parameters.description: The inputs bus from which to drive output 1.

parameters.name: Output 2 Bus
parameters.description: The inputs bus from which to drive output 2.

parameters.name: Output 3 Bus
parameters.description: The inputs bus from which to drive output 3.

parameters.name: Output 4 Bus
parameters.description: The inputs bus from which to drive output 4.

parameters.name: Output 5 Bus
parameters.description: The inputs bus from which to drive output 5.

parameters.name: Output 6 Bus
parameters.description: The inputs bus from which to drive output 6.

parameters.name: Output 7 Bus
parameters.description: The inputs bus from which to drive output 7.

parameters.name: Output 8 Bus
parameters.description: The inputs bus from which to drive output 8.

output_ports.name: ESX-8CV Output 1
output_ports.description: Hardware output 1 of the ESX-8CV module

output_ports.name: ESX-8CV Output 2
output_ports.description: Hardware output 2 of the ESX-8CV module

output_ports.name: ESX-8CV Output 3
output_ports.description: Hardware output 3 of the ESX-8CV module

output_ports.name: ESX-8CV Output 4
output_ports.description: Hardware output 4 of the ESX-8CV module

output_ports.description: Hardware output 5 of the ESX-8CV module

output_ports.name: ESX-8CV Output 6
output_ports.description: Hardware output 6 of the ESX-8CV module

output_ports.name: ESX-8CV Output 7
output_ports.description: Hardware output 7 of the ESX-8CV module
